endpoints.label: Domain Search

fields.label: Domain
fields.description: Domain name from which you want to find the email addresses. For example, "stripe.com".

fields.label: Only Emails
fields.description: Whether to return only the found emails

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: type, seniority, department)

endpoints.description: Get every email address found on the internet using a given domain name, with sources

endpoints.label: Email Finder

fields.label: Domain
fields.description: Domain name from which you want to find the email addresses. For example, "stripe.com".

fields.label: First Name
fields.description: The person's first name. It doesn't need to be in lowercase.

fields.label: Last Name
fields.description: The person's last name. It doesn't need to be in lowercase.

endpoints.description: Generate or retrieve the most likely email address from a domain name, a first name and a last name

endpoints.label: Email Verifier

fields.label: Email
fields.description: The email address you want to verify

endpoints.description: Verify the deliverability of an email address
